name: Tourist Destination Patterns
description: Tourism-driven economies show predictable seasonal activity fluctuations. Analyze peak vs off-peak patterns in major tourist destinations.

period_a.name: Peak Season
period_a.description: Varies by destination - see region details

key_findings: Orlando: Summer peak from theme parks (school vacation)
Las Vegas: Convention-driven patterns (March, October highest)
Clear correlation with school holiday periods
Weekend vs weekday patterns also visible in higher-frequency data
methodology_notes: Tourism patterns inferred from nightlight intensity variations. Major events can create short-term spikes not captured in monthly composites.
